title: Legacy ETL service account key
risk_assessment: Medium - key-based auth for ETL running on legacy on-prem server that does not support workload identity
compensating_controls: IP allowlisting to ETL server; key stored in HashiCorp Vault; automated daily key usage audit

title: Monitoring agent service account key
risk_assessment: Low - monitoring agent on edge nodes requires static credentials
compensating_controls: Read-only permissions; key rotated every 6 months; agent restricted to monitoring/logging roles only

title: Terraform state import key
risk_assessment: Low - one-time infrastructure import; key to be deleted after import
compensating_controls: Time-limited to 30 days; editor role scoped to import only; key deletion scheduled in Jira

title: Legacy ETL service account key (renewal)
risk_assessment: Medium - same as EXC-2025-001; migration to Cloud Composer planned for Q1 2026
compensating_controls: Same as EXC-2025-001 plus monthly migration status check
